notes:
Batch-C: app/src/workspace/view.rs — 60 entries. 51 UI translations + 8 panic_message flags + 1 telemetry_payload flag. Notable handling:
- Handoff terminology: '转交' (per PRD batch-C context).
- 'Oz CLI' / 'Oz command': 'Oz' retained as brand per glossary.
- '{prefix}update-tab-config' kept verbatim (agent slash-command).
- 'Run Agent Mode Workflow' (L15980): flagged telemetry_payload — it's a LoginGatedFeature str passed into TelemetryEvent::AnonymousUserAttemptLoginGatedFeature.
- Trailing '...' → '……' throughout.
- All placeholders preserved verbatim ({e}, {err}, {error}, {friendly_path}, {repo_display_name}, {name}, {base_branch}, {command_name}, {title}, {}, {prefix}).
